description: Imran Khan shares 20 lessons for crypto founders based on his experience building startups, emphasizing the importance of focusing on small problems and being flexible while maintaining a clear vision.
topic_summary: In this keynote, Imran Khan discusses key lessons for startup founders, including the significance of starting with small problems, avoiding consensus ideas, and the necessity of building for a small group of users. He highlights the importance of launching quickly and iterating based on user feedback [t=4:00 - t=202:78].
